title: Aluminum Colored Carabiner Key Chain Spring Clip Medium Size Assorted Colors 6pk
description:
These colorful carabiners are a great way to keep your keys organized and easily accessible, whether they're in your purse, pocket or key bowl. They come in 7 different colors, so everyone will be able to keep their keys straight and color-coded. Measuring in at just 2.75" long and 7mm thick, these carabiners are the perfect size for holding your keys and other key chains. Grab some of these carabiners and never worry about misplacing your keys again! Please note: these carabiners are not meant to be used for climbing. Color ships at random
